mapper.select: SELECT student_id AS studentId, ROUND(SUM(credit_gpa) / NULLIF(SUM(credit), 0), 2) AS avgGpa FROM record_academic WHERE is_invalidated = '否' GROUP BY student_id

SELECT academic_year AS academicYear, ROUND(SUM(credit_gpa) / NULLIF(SUM(credit), 0), 2) AS avgGpa, SUM(credit) AS totalCredit FROM record_academic WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND is_invalidated = '否' GROUP BY academic_year ORDER BY academic_year ASC
